Hii!! I am back!

Guys u know?☹️

I have friends..we have been friends since elementary school,He is 1 year older than me, and we are close friends, but now she and I are like strangers..Not really, but she has new friends now, and I don't really mind..just a little jealous, especially since one of her friends also likes Harris Caine and sol.4ce😭

I'm a bit jealous of them, to be honest I also have friends in my new place... but I miss being with them...

But okay..tht's okay :)

Of all of them, no one can replace her.

Just it,

Aaaaaand,

I'm sorry if you don't like it,🤧

You can edit the message and the bot will learn..,

English is not my first language so I apologize if there are wrong words/sentences and wrong word placement.

Enjoy your messages lovee>⁠.⁠<

I know I made this bot weird💀

BOT PROBLEM꧂

"he/she continues to speak for me!"

I'm sorry for that, but that's AI problem..So that the bot doesn't speak for you, you should not type anything too rude,and don't give responses and messages that are too short..That makes the bot talk for you

"He/she kept repeating his words!"

That's a problem..I couldn't possibly ask him to repeat his words😭

"He's/she's talking crazy/out of scenario!"

I'm sorry for that..but that's also AI's problem..I suggest deleting or editing messages that you think don't make sense
